canonical-status-literals.description: The authoritative mapping of valid set status values (pending, discussed, planned, executed, complete, merged) and their allowed transitions. All skills and agents MUST reference these exact strings.

corrected-skill-transitions.description: All 24 SKILL.md files updated to use past-tense status literals matching SET_TRANSITIONS. Specifically: discussing -> discussed, executing -> executed, reviewing -> removed.

status-literal-consistency.description: Every `state transition set` call in any SKILL.md or agent .md file must use a status value that exists in SET_TRANSITIONS keys or values. No present-tense status names (discussing, executing, planning, reviewing) may appear in transition calls.

transition-validity.description: Every transition sequence in skills must follow the SET_TRANSITIONS graph: pending -> discussed -> planned -> executed -> complete -> merged. No skipping steps.
